item.title: A Dungeons & Dragons Game Turns Deadly
item.description: True Crime Recaps explores a Dungeons & Dragons campaign that became tied to an inheritance plot.

media:content.media:title: A Dungeons & Dragons Game Turns Deadly
media:content.media:description: True Crime Recaps explores a Dungeons & Dragons campaign that became tied to an inheritance plot.

item.title: Married Her Husband's Killer After Scheming With Him For Insurance Money
item.description:
Mike Williams vanished in 2000 during a duck hunting trip in Florida, and authorities initially believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators. His boat was found abandoned, and no body was recovered.
Years later, the truth emerged. Investigators uncovered a plot involving his wife, Denise Williams, and his best friend, Brian Winchester, who were having an affair. He was murdered, and the case remained hidden for 17 years before a confession exposed everything.

media:content.media:title: Married Her Husband's Killer After Scheming With Him For Insurance Money
media:content.media:description:
Mike Williams vanished in 2000 during a duck hunting trip in Florida, and authorities initially believed he drowned and was eaten by alligators. His boat was found abandoned, and no body was recovered.
Years later, the truth emerged. Investigators uncovered a plot involving his wife, Denise Williams, and his best friend, Brian Winchester, who were having an affair. He was murdered, and the case remained hidden for 17 years before a confession exposed everything.
